heading: Specialty areas in
adult cardiac
surgery.
lead: All operations take place at fully equipped contracted hospitals. The clinic itself is used for consultation, planning and follow-up.

cards.title: Coronary artery surgery
cards.desc: Restoring blood flow through occluded coronaries — classic, off-pump and minimally invasive approaches.

cards.title: Heart valve surgery
cards.desc: Tailored open and transcatheter approaches for aortic and mitral valve disease.

cards.title: Aortic surgery
cards.desc: Elective and emergency procedures for the aortic root, ascending aorta and dissection.

cards.title: Other adult cardiac surgery
cards.desc: Cardiac tumours, rhythm surgery and pericardial disease — handled with the same care.

signature.title: MIDCAB — the surgeon's signature procedure
signature.sub: Coronary bypass through a small incision under the left breast — no sternotomy.
